title: Kelly Haggerty Appointed to Deputy Commissioner of Water
summary: Syracuse Mayor Sharon F. Owens appointed Kelly Haggerty as Deputy Commissioner of Water, effective July 1, 2026. Haggerty brings 17 years of municipal engineering experience and will support departmental operations, policy development, and day-to-day management. Her background includes facilities engineering, public buildings oversight, and property management at the NY State Fair.

political_signal.description: Mayor emphasizes water system reliability, efficiency, and sustainability as strategic priorities; internal capacity-building investment signaling commitment to infrastructure modernization.

processing_notes: Author listed as 'Unknown' in source metadata
Haggerty's appointment represents internal promotion from city engineering sector to water operations leadership
No budget impact or salary information provided in release
